tests.name: Subcontractor merged (12pg scanned)
tests.notes: 12-page merged: pages 1-2 have text (TAX INVOICE + PAYMENT ADVICE), pages 3-12 are scanned images (0 text chars). Splitter must handle image-only pages. NZ entity (Johnson Health Tech New Zealand, NZD currency, GST 41-229-926).

tests.name: Subcontractor short (3pg text)
tests.notes: 3-page merged: p1 = Tax Invoice (Blue SL / The Treadmill Surgeon), p2 = payment advice / signature page, p3 = Contractor Worksheet (CASE PRODUCT# JAU260100588). AU entity (ABN 72 424 989 387).

tests.name: D&I merged (2pg)
tests.notes: 2-page merged: p1 = TAX INVOICE (Allied Technical Services, D&I of ABD machine), p2 = Installation worksheet (short, signed by Scott Craven 05/02/26). AU entity (ABN 54 634 934 357).

tests.name: Legal standalone (2pg)
tests.notes: 2-page standalone: p1 = Tax Invoice (HWL Ebsworth Lawyers, Product Warranty Advice, $3,941.85), p2 = Remittance Advice. LEGAL is NOT a Phase 1 category — system will force-fit to closest match. Category assertion skipped.

tests.name: Freight sea/air merged (28pg)
tests.notes: 28-page merged: p1 = TAX INVOICE 04112170 (Mainfreight, sea freight from Vietnam), p2 = Australian Customs Entry, p3+ = bill of lading, commercial invoices, packing lists, serial number sheets. Contains shipping docs (CONSOL C02671960, vessel KOTA LUMAYAN). Complex multi-doc split.

tests.name: Freight road (2pg)
tests.notes: 2-page standalone: p1 = TAX INVOICE (Booths Logistics, road freight Wiri->Dunedin, gym equipment), p2 = disclaimer/footer. Single invoice, no supporting docs. NZ entity (GST 135-486-062, NZD).

tests.name: Marketing standalone (1pg)
tests.notes: 1-page standalone: TAX INVOICE (Body Fit Training Unit Trust, Bronze Sponsorship $2,750 AUD). MARKETING is NOT a Phase 1 category — system will force-fit to closest match. Category assertion skipped.

tests.name: Missing doc detection
tests.notes: Placeholder: reuses marketing invoice as proxy. MARKETING is not Phase 1 category. TODO: create a standalone subcontractor invoice (without worksheet) to properly test missing-doc detection.

tests.name: Non-invoice email
tests.notes: Requires email-like input: subject 'When will payment arrive?' with no invoice attachment. Tests classify step returning NON_INVOICE. Manual test -- cannot POST a PDF for this.

tests.name: Pre-split upload (regression)
tests.notes: Existing pre-split test data (root of test-data/). Two separate 1-page PDFs uploaded together. Splitter should NOT re-split single-page PDFs. Pipeline should work as before.

tests.name: Password-protected PDF
tests.notes: Encrypted PDF (password: testpass123). pdftotext will return empty text. Splitter should detect and flag as protected/unprocessable. Created via pypdf.

tests.name: >50 pages PDF
tests.notes: No real test PDF >50 pages found (largest is Mainfreight at 28 pages). TODO: create a synthetic 55-page PDF by duplicating pages from an existing file, or test with Mainfreight and lower the threshold.

tests.name: Non-PDF attachment
tests.notes: Plain text file (.txt). Splitter should skip non-PDF files entirely and pass through unchanged. Tests file extension check.
